title: sclarea austriaca
intro: Sclarea austriaca, also known as Austrian chamomile or golden chamomile, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Sclarea austriaca include its ability to soothe skin irritations, calm nervous systems, and aid in digestion. The herbal preparations of Sclarea austriaca include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to make salves, lotions, and other topical treatments.
